response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:09: Performer intro and dancing identified. 2. 00:09-03:28: Song 'Kimi no Soba' performed by Tokino Sora. Identified via chorus lyrics 'Osanai koro kara zutto zutto'. Searched for lyrics and found them on Piapro. 3. 03:28-05:03: Post-performance talk/banter with audience identified.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance by Tokino Sora of the song 'Kimi no Soba', followed by post-performance banter with the audience.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora poses and performs a short intro dance before the song begins.
Tokino Sora performs 'Kimi no Soba'. The stage features colorful lights and graphics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
（ａメロ）
空っぽな私の心に
感情という名の綿詰め
機械的な泣き笑いを
演技しろって馬鹿みたい

（ｂメロ）
何詰めでも何入れても
動かないままだだけど
捨てないで棄てないで
私をここに居させて

（サビ）
幼い頃からずっとずっと
大人になるまでずっとずっと
変わらない愛をありがとう
これからもずっとお元気で
傍らに置いたままの時間が
私にとっては幸せでした

（ａメロ）
解れそうな私の身体は
継ぎ接いだ跡で出来た命
生かされたなんて思っちゃいないが
痛みは無いんだ

（ｂメロ）
何詰めでも何入れても
話せないままだだけど
捨てないで棄てないで
まだここに居させて

（サビ）
昔のあなたからずっとずっと
今に至るまでずっとずっと
大事にしてくれてありがとう
これからもずっとお元気で
陽だまりに置いたままの時間が
少し辛かったかな

（ｃメロ）
私の姿は生まれた時から殆ど変わらないけれど
あなたは少しずつ大きくなって別人のようにになってく
それでもあなたはあなただと信じているから
あなたと過ごした時間が偽りじゃないと思っているから

（落ちサビ）
幼い頃からずっとずっと
大人になるまでずっとずっと
変わらない愛をありがとう
これからもずっとお元気で
もうお別れかもしれないけど
何故か悲しくはないんだ

（サビ）
昔のあなたからずっとずっと
今に至るまでずっとずっと
大事にしてくれてありがとう
これからもずっとお元気で
傍らに置いたままの時間が
私にとっては幸せでした
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(A-melody)
Inside my empty heart
Stuffing cotton called emotion
Acting like crying and laughing mechanically
It's like being a fool

(B-melody)
No matter what I stuff in or put in
It remains unmoving, but
Don't throw me away, don't discard me
Let me stay here

(Chorus)
From when I was young, always, always
Until I became an adult, always, always
Thank you for the unchanging love
Take care forever from now on too
The time spent by your side
Was happiness for me

(A-melody)
My body that seems to fray
Is a life made of stitched scars
I don't think I've been kept alive
But I feel no pain

(B-melody)
No matter what I stuff in or put in
It remains unable to speak, but
Don't throw me away, don't discard me
Let me stay here still

(Chorus)
From the you of long ago, always, always
Until now, always, always
Thank you for treasuring me
Take care forever from now on too
The time spent in the sunlight
Was it a little painful?

(C-melody)
My appearance has barely changed since I was born
But you have grown little by little and become a different person
Even so, I believe that you are you
I believe that the time I spent with you was not a lie

(Falling Chorus)
From when I was young, always, always
Until I became an adult, always, always
Thank you for the unchanging love
Take care forever from now on too
It might be a farewell now
But for some reason, I am not sad

(Chorus)
From the you of long ago, always, always
Until now, always, always
Thank you for treasuring me
Take care forever from now on too
The time spent by your side
Was happiness for me

scenes.description: Tokino Sora talks with the audience after the performance.
